title: ConcreteSection
description: ConcreteSection: Concrete section to be used on Bars. Defined by a section profile. Note that all section constants are assuming an uncracked section and are disregarding reinforcement.

Name.description: A unique Name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Area.description:
Gross Area of the cross section
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Area meassured in [m²].

Rgy.description:
Radius of Gyration about the local Y-Axis
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Rgz.description:
Radius of Gyration about the local Z-Axis
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

J.description:
Torsion Constant
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type TorsionConstant meassured in [m⁴].

Iy.description:
Moment of Inertia about the local Y-Axis
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type SecondMomentOfArea meassured in [m⁴].

Iz.description:
Moment of Inertia about the local Z-Axis
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type SecondMomentOfArea meassured in [m⁴].

Iw.description:
Warping Constant
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type WarpingConstant meassured in [m⁶].

Wely.description:
Elastic Modulus of the section about the local Y-Axis
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus meassured in [m³].

Welz.description:
Elastic Modulus of the section about the local Z-Axis
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus meassured in [m³].

Wply.description:
Plastic Modulus of the section about the local Y-Axis
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus meassured in [m³].

Wplz.description:
Plastic Modulus of the section about the local Z-Axis
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type SectionModulus meassured in [m³].

CentreZ.description:
Geometric centre of the section in the local Z direction
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

CentreY.description:
Geometric centre of the section in the local Y direction
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Vz.description:
Z distance from the centroid of the section to top edge of the section
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Vpz.description:
Z distance from the centroid of the section to bottom edge of the section
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Vy.description:
Y distance from the centroid of the section to right edge of the section
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Vpy.description:
Y distance from the centroid of the section to Left edge of the section
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Asy.description:
Shear Area in the local Y direction
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

Asz.description:
Shear Area in the local Z direction
 Uncracked section disregarding the reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
